phases: Phase 1: Surface-tag lint logic + CLI mode (qor/scripts/feature_index_verify.py)

limitations: V1 schema-optional WARN-only presence lint; degradation event on untagged non-n/a rows; disclosed-skip when no Surface column; missing index silent skip.
exclusions: repos without FEATURE_INDEX or without a Surface column produce no blocking output; regression ABORT path untouched.

feature_inventory_touches.test_descriptor: surface_lint returns untagged=(FX002,) for an untagged verified row when a Surface column is declared; () when all tagged; column_present=False when no column; --surface-lint CLI exits 0 and emits degradation/gate_skipped_prerequisite_absent events accordingly
